programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Scorpions - Forever And A Day: Live In Munich
programme.desc: After 50 years on stages all around the world, Germany's Scorpions decided it was time to embark on one last tour. This fully authorized documentary follows the hard rockers from their beginnings as young music fans to the present day.

programme.title: Def Leppard - Hysteria At The O2
programme.desc: Sheffield's finest make their long-awaited debut at London's O2m Arena in November 2018. Marking the 31st anniversary of Hysteria they played the whole of the ground breaking album in chronological order featuring hits like Pour Some Sugar on Me, Ani...

programme.title: Supertramp: Breakfast In America: Live in Paris
programme.desc: Supertramp's Breakfast In America was the biggest selling album in the world in 1979. Following the album's release Supertramp embarked on a 10-month world tour which arrived in Paris at the end of November.

programme.title: J Balvin - Bruuttal
programme.desc: J. Balvin returns to his hometown of Medellín, Colombia to perform a special anniversary concert entitled BRUUTTAL. A musical journey that begins with his early songs and ends with his most recent, multi-platinum album, Energía.

programme.title: John Mellencamp - Plain Spoken: Live in Chicago
programme.desc: John Mellencamp's career in music, spanning more than 42 years, has seen him transition from pop star to one of the most highly regarded songwriters of a generation.

programme.title: Rush - Time Machine: Live in Cleveland
programme.desc: Celebrating 30 years since the 1981 release of their classic bestselling album 'Moving Pictures,' the band performed the entire album live for the first time as the centerpiece of the concerts.

programme.title: Def Leppard - Hysteria At The O2

programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode of Future Superstar focuses on punk rock rapper Klondike Blonde. Raised by a single father, Klondike discovered her love for music at a young age. After moving to Atlanta, she shortly rose to fame. This is her story.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: JD is a triple-threat entertainer who rose to fame in commercials and then skyrocketed when he became the voice of Young Simba in the Lion King remake. Raw talent and a genuine passion for his craft make JD a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: The sixth episode tells the story of Long Beach rapper, DW Flame. After spending 18 months in jail, DW was exonerated and attacked the vocal booth with renewed hunger, detailing the adversities he had overcome.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Jilly has all the makings of a star. We explore the challenges she faced thus far in the music industry and see how her determination is respected in the music space.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: TRAETWOTHREE is ready to show the world he is the next superstar out of South Central, blending dusky R&B, hip-hop swagger, and West Coast spirit.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Nick Cannon introduces the world to his new R&B boy band, Pop Money. We'll witness the highs and lows of the band's first tour as well as their initial success as they release their debut EP.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Nick Cannon sits down with VIBE editor-in-chief Datwon Thomas to make their predictions for the season 1 artists and where their careers will take them.

programme.title: Snoop Dogg: Uncaged
programme.desc: From Crime to Primetime. For over five decades rapper, songwriter, and media personality Calvin Cordozar Broadus Jr. aka 'Snoop Dogg' would go onto global fame, with tens of millions of record sales and a career in movies and television.

programme.title: 50 Cent: Rap Star
programme.desc: He’s the winner of 13 Billboard Music Awards, a Grammy Award, and six World Music Awards. His dark and edgy lyrics portray his life as a gangster, a criminal and a survivor of drugs. His music reflects the hardship he went through to become what he is.

programme.title: Lil Wayne: Bling
programme.desc: Releasing his first solo studio album at just the age of 15, Lil Wayne has shot through the ranks of the hip-hop scene. He has challenged societal ideas about image and has really become the representative of modern hip-hop. Follow the story of the man...

programme.title: Larry King Now: Wiz Khalifa
programme.desc: Music superstar Wiz Khalifa gives Larry a lesson in hip-hop culture and shares his excitement over soon becoming a dad. Plus, the tattooed rapper offers Larry some pointers on getting inked.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A snow-covered winter fantasy land seems so real, and Bob Ross shows you how easy his special painting technique can be.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join guest artist Steve Ross today -- experience the magnificence of splendid mountains and glassy lake embraced by leafy trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of a cold, wintry forest, Bob Ross gently places a magical little wooden shanty upon a bed of soft snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: With brush in hand, Bob Ross leads you on a summertime nature walk, as you uncover the beauty of leafy trees and ponds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross shows you how two beautiful mountain and evergreen oval scenes can be harmonized into one memorable masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Capture a vision of glory with Bob Ross as you view the brilliance of afternoon sunlight peeking over a distant mountain top.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy guest artist Dana Jester and his dark soft forest; discover the brilliance of the sun's glow bouncing off a quiet stream and majestic oaks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the golden radiance of a setting sun with Bob Ross as night hastens over a softly blended knoll - you'll be home at last, just down trail's end.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross and experience the magic of early morning in an oval, as gentle trickles and splashes of a happy stream pierce the silence.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will fascinate you with this crimson winter scene, where cabin and snow are virtually undisturbed and the evergreens are full.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Venture into the heart of Americana with Bob Ross and discover the serenity of a snow-covered farmhouse and barn on a cold January day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Something new and different -- paint a wintry country scene on a wooden sawblade with guest artist Dorothy Dent.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us deep into the southeastern peninsula to create a beautiful scene with still blue waters and bright green mossy trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visiting artist, Ben Stahl, uses a more traditional painting method to bring out the coy loveliness of a little girl.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross today as he paints a huge, single stately oak, just on the edge of the forest, its spreading branches and foliage providing comfort and shelter.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the peacefulness of the calm evening as you take a walk with Bob Ross through the enchanted timberlands just before nightfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross for a stroll down yonder by the river, relax in the serenity of an expansive yet quiet sky with proud evergreens looking on.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Dry mountains, spiny shrubs and cacti, take a drive deep into the desert with Bob Ross and enjoy this fantastic oval surprise!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drink in the astonishing beauty of a spectacular desert as you ride down a well traveled road with the amazing brushes of Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Old-time memories are conjured up by the sight of this lonesome big barn that Bob Ross places on the edge of a forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Far, far away there rests a mountain nestled in misty clouds and foothills. Bob Ross creates a scene using soft, brilliant colors.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Snow-covered trees and shrubs appear to be dressed in finest lace among the soft glows of winter. A unique Bob Ross painting!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relish the tranquility of valley waters gently falling into a quiet summer mere - smooth cliffs and trees frame this Bob Ross wonderland.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll along the beach at sunset with Bob Ross and feel the gentle breezes blow as the waves softly kiss the shore in this oval masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross chooses to make a pond in the middle of a darkened forest the subject of today's mood-evoking creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Spend a relaxing half-hour with Bob Ross as he paints a mountain scene with soft, sloping grass cover, crystal lake, and rocky banks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch Bob Ross create a sweet little waterfall in the middle of a protective forest of glorious early autumn foliage.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Julia Collin Davison fries up crispy Chicken Schnitzel.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ginger Frozen Yogurt, Lemon Posset with Berries; review of digital scales

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Jim Thorpe is named the greatest athlete of the 20th century, Babe Didrikson breaks down gender barriers in sports, and Jim Abbott achieves prominence as a pitcher despite having only one hand. Featuring Jason Momoa, Zach Gilford and Emily Deschanel.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Actor Clark Gable joins the Air Force during World War II, Ponce de Leon quarrels with Diego Columbus, and Griselda Blanco takes over the cocaine trade in Miami. Featuring Josh Hartnett, Maya Rudolph, David Koechner and Johnny Knoxville.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Paleontologists Othniel Marsh and Edward Cope become rivals, and Penzias & Wilson discover the echo of the Big Bang. Featuring Greg Kinnear, Stephen Merchant, Justin Long, Jason Ritter, Tony Hale and Christopher Meloni.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Pirate John Lafitte helps Andrew Jackson defeat the British during the War of 1812, Sam Zemurray becomes a banana kingpin, and Louis Armstrong becomes a jazz legend. Featuring Jack McBrayer, Thomas Middleditch, Jason Momoa, Miles Brown and Andre Royo.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Harriet Tubman provides military intel to the Union Army, Virginia Hall spies in France during World War II and becomes the first woman in the CIA, and Roald Dahl serves as a debonair British spy. Featuring Octavia Spencer, Alia Shawkat and Will Ferrell.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria and Jane team up with different partners on an economics project after new tensions over Tom put a rift between them.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria's class is caught in a snowstorm while on a field trip to the mountains, and Jake and Helen try to reignite intimacy in their relationship.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Lawndale's reputation takes a major hit when an injured Kevin leaves the football team after a motorcycle accident.

programme.title: MST3K: The Christmas That Almost Wasn't
programme.desc: The gang gets in the holiday spirit with the tale of a plucky lawyer who sets out to save Santa Claus from the clutches of a spoilsport zillionaire.

programme.title: MST3K: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: In part four of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 1979 film The Day Time Ended.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: In part two of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the team discuss the Satellite of Love crew.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K
programme.desc: Watch some in-depth interviews and get an inside look at the movie itself that is classically riffed in this Mystery Science Theater 3000 episode.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K: Santa Versus Satan
programme.desc: This episode of Backlot features an interview with some MST3K crew and other experts as they look back at this quirky Rene Cardona-directed movie.

programme.title: MST3K: The Land The Time Forgot
programme.desc: A motley group aboard a German U-boat discovers an island full of ancient beasts and evolutionary mysteries in the blustery 1974 adventure.

programme.title: MST3K: The Loves Of Hercules
programme.desc: The Far-fetched flight scenes and tangled plot lines of this breathy 1960 Jayne Mansfield saga nudge Jonah and friends one step closer to the edge.

programme.title: MST3K: The Time Travelers
programme.desc: A botched experiment hurls a group of scientists into a bleak future full of mutants, androids and catty humans in this 1964 sci-fi romp.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Advance your career by finishing this enlightening two-part short featuring timeless sales advice.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A high school senior named Sue and her boyfriend want to get married right after Sue graduates. A marriage counselor discourages the young couple from entering into a hasty marriage.

programme.title: MST3K: Wizards Of The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: A boy magician, a boozy hero and a furry - something-or-other team up to save a kingdom from a nefarious sorcerer in this 1985 cheesefest.

programme.title: MST3K: Wizards Of The Lost Kingdom II
programme.desc: The Mads turn up the heat with a sequel. This time, a has-been wizard and his gawky apprentice embark on their own mind-bending quest to quash evil.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The one-armed man hires a gunman to ambush Richard Kimble.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is mistakenly identified as the murderer of a neighborhood girl while working as an apartment building janitor in a slum.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton are taken hostage by a group of terrorists threatening to take over a nearby city.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is shocked when he learns that the thief who stole a vial of deadly bacteria from the Phoenix Foundation is an old friend who once saved his life.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A newly released convict bent on revenge hunts down MacGyver in the woods, using Pete Thornton and Jack Dalton as bait.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A late night call for help sends Dr. Sloan racing to the rescue! Ninety-two-year-old millionaire Jonathan Nash fears for his life.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A supposed 'ticket to heaven' leads to a trail of greedy scam artists and gamblers! Dying of a gunshot wounds, a man gives Dr. Sloan a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A box of mutilated flowers and slashed photos drives pop-singer Shanda into a state of shock. After she collapses and her road tour grinds to a halt, Dr. Mark Sloan takes pity on Shanda and embarks on a search to find her mysterious stalker.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Donna and James wonder why Maddy left so suddenly. Norma's mother arrives with news…she's married a new man, Ernie Niles. Cooper tells Leland they arrested Ben Horne for Laura's murder.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Albert returns to examine Maddy. Cooper asks for twenty-four hours to finish his case. James and Donna reaffirm their love. Andy accidentally leads Donna and Cooper back to Mrs. Tremond's house.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Leland is laid to rest and Sarah Palmer tries to accept all that has happened to her family. Dr. Jacoby returns from Hawaii. Cooper prepares to leave Twin Peaks. Mayor Milford objects to his brothers engagement to a younger woman.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: McCall finds her loyalties sharply divided when an important murder case is jeopardized by Hunter, who thinks the defendant is innocent.

programme.title: Brannigan
programme.desc: John Wayne stars as Chicago Police Lieutenant Jim Brannigan and Richard Attenborough co-stars as British policeman Cmdr. Swann in this action-comedy. Brannigan teams up in the U.K. with Cmdr Swann to escort a crime boss back to the U.S.

programme.title: Death Wish
programme.desc: In this explosive story of revenge and urban violence, Charles Bronson plays Paul Kersey, a bleeding-heart liberal who has a change of opinion after his wife and daughter are violently attacked by a gang of thugs in their apartment.

programme.title: The Parallax View
programme.desc: Warren Beatty is a news reporter who, along with seven others, witnesses the assassination of a political candidate.

programme.title: Escape To Athena
programme.desc: A World War II adventure, involving a group of Allied POWs, Nazis, black market priceless art treasures, Greek resistance, a Greek monastery, and a secret German rocket base.

programme.title: Go Tell the Spartans
programme.desc: A savvy U.S. major (Burt Lancaster) reluctantly obeys an ill-advised order to send out a unit of South Vietnamese troops and American advisors to a peaceful, former French outpost. He fears it will draw the Viet Cong into the area – and he’s right!

programme.title: Apocalypse Now: Redux
programme.desc: This is the definitive version of Francis Ford Coppola's stunning vision of the heart of darkness in all of us, re-edited and re- mastered with 49 minutes of additional footage.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: The fate of mankind rests in the hands of a teenager (Matthew Broderick) who accidentally taps into the Defense Department's tactical computer. Dabney Coleman and Ally Sheedy co-star.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: With brothers Mikey and Brand's house slated for demolition by greedy developers, the boys' only hope lies in finding a long-lost treasure. They uncover a treasure map and, with their friends, descend to a subterranean sea and an abandoned galleon.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: The rules for a Mogwai are simple: Keep your Mogwai away from water, bright lights and, most importantly, never feed him after midnight. But in Kingston Falls the rules are broken, and the consequences multiply at an alarming rate.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: This confrontation between good and evil stars Kevin Costner as federal agent Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro as gangland kingpin Al Capone, and Sean Connery as Malone, the cop who teaches Ness how to beat the mob: shoot fast and shoot first.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: The Phantom
programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the Skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: Comedy sensation Mike Myers stars with Nancy Travis in this hatchet-driven romantic comedy about a wedlock-shy coffee house poet who finally meets the perfect woman. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Encino Man
programme.desc: Two high school buddies dig up a frozen caveman in their backyard!

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Eurotrip
programme.desc: Europe will never be the same again after Scotty Thomas and his buddies take off for the express to excess! They're hooking up with hot strangers and jamming all the extreme insanity they can into the wildest trip of their lives!

programme.title: Here Comes the Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches to raise money to save the school's music program.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black is more hilarious than ever as Ignacio, a monastery cook who feeds orphan children by day and by night transforms himself into Nacho Libre, a notorious Luchador in stretchy pants.

programme.title: School of Rock
programme.desc: Jack Black stars as a guitarist with delusions of grandeur. Kicked out of his band and looking for work, he becomes a substitute teacher and turns his class into rock and rollers.

programme.title: Orange County

programme.title: Tropic Thunder

programme.title: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: A wounded Irish nationalist leader attempts to evade police following a failed robbery in Belfast.

programme.title: The Night Of The Hunter
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum stars in an unforgettable role as a psychopathic preacher in relentless pursuit of two children who have their dead father's stolen fortune hidden in a doll. Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: Killer's Kiss
programme.desc: This dazzling film noir from Stanley Kubrick is about a struggling New York boxer (Jamie Smith), whose life is imperiled when he protects a nightclub dancer (Irene Kane) from her gangster boss.

programme.title: The Killing
programme.desc: With fascinating detail, Stanley Kubrick lays bare the intricate inner-planning of a racetrack heist by a deadly mastermind (Sterling Hayden) and his crew. Co-stars Coleen Gray.

programme.title: Paths Of Glory
programme.desc: This powerful, fact-based absurdity-of-war film stars Kirk Douglas as a commanding officer who defends three scapegoats on trial for a failed offensive that occurred within the French Army in 1916.

programme.title: The Vikings
programme.desc: Legends Kirk Douglas, Tony Curtis, Ernest Borgnine and Janet Leigh dazzle in this epic chronicle of brutal rivalry and bloodthirsty ambition as two brothers are locked in a battle that will decide their fate...and that of a beautiful princess.

programme.title: Detective Story
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas stars as the rigid detective whose personal code has become twisted from dealing with too many criminals. Eleanor Parker is his wife, tormented by a guilty secret.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Prince Hamlet struggles over whether or not he should kill his uncle, whom he suspects has murdered his father, the former king.

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks
programme.desc: There’s only one thing keeping aspiring executive Tim from corporate success. He must find the perfect guest to bring to his boss’s monthly dinner party, where the winner of the evening is the one who arrives with the biggest buffoon.

programme.title: The Guilt Trip
programme.desc: "Barbra Streisand and Seth Rogen are the perfect comedy duo"* as they embark on one mother of a road trip! When Andy invites his mom on an 8-day, 3,000-mile journey across the country, the farther they go, the closer they get. *Jake Hamilton, FOX-TV

programme.title: Yours, Mine & Ours
programme.desc: A widowed Coast Guard Admiral and a widow handbag designer fall in love and marry, much to the dismay of her 10 and his 8 children.

programme.title: Winchester
programme.desc: To an outsider, Sarah Winchester's 7-story home looks like a monstrous monument to a disturbed woman's madness. But Sarah's actually building a prison -- an asylum for hundreds of vengeful ghosts that have a score to settle with her family.

programme.title: Dark Skies
programme.desc: A couple (Keri Russell, Josh Hamilton) and their children gather their courage and determination to combat a terrifying threat that may be from an alien force.

programme.title: Blackwater Lane

A man who specializes in debunking paranormal occurrences checks into the fabled room 1408 in the Dolphin Hotel. Soon after settling in, he confronts genuine terror.

programme.title: Winchester
programme.desc: Ensconced in her sprawling San Jose, California mansion, eccentric firearm heiress Sarah Winchester believes she is haunted by the souls of people killed by the Winchester repeating rifle.

programme.title: Dark Skies
programme.desc: A couple (Keri Russell, Josh Hamilton) and their children gather their courage and determination to combat a terrifying threat that may be from an alien force.

programme.title: Blackwater Lane
programme.desc: Late one night a woman drives by a stranded motorist who is later revealed to have been murdered. After a series of terrifying events the woman believes she is the killer's next victim.

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his oddball friends kidnap a gangster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Swiss Army Man
programme.desc: Hank (Paul Dano) is stranded on a deserted island and given up all hope. Everything changes when a corpse (Daniel Radcliffe) washes ashore. They become fast friends and go on an epic adventure to bring Hank back to the woman of his dreams.

programme.desc: A hilarious comedy starring Mike Myers as guru Pitka in his first original character since the blockbuster hit Austin Powers.

programme.desc: A goofy Korean finds his life hopelessly complicated when people continually confusing him with Bruce Lee while he unknowingly transports cocaine across the country.

programme.desc: The heat is on in this fast-paced action-comedy starring Eddie Murphy as Axel Foley, a street smart Detroit cop tracking down his best friend's killer in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The heat's back on! And Eddie Murphy is cool as ever in this sizzling, smash-hit sequel to Beverly Hills Cop.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Eddie's back! So are the laughs. Eddie Murphy returns as Detroit cop Axel Foley, getting down with the fun-and-sun set as never before in this revved up thrill-ride of a movie.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Advertising executive Marcus Graham is a quintessential bachelor, Graham is never without a new lady on his arm. Enter Jacqueline, his new boss, and Marcus is on the receiving end of his own patented behavior for the first time!

programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: Popeye

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey
programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Succubus
programme.desc: A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls At Parties
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Enn, a shy teenager in 70s London, meets the beautiful and rebellious Zan (Elle Fanning) at a party. They set in motion the ultimate showdown between their rivaling worlds and test the limits of how far they will go for true love.

programme.title: Encino Man
programme.desc: Two high school buddies dig up a frozen caveman in their backyard!

programme.title: Clue
programme.desc: Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes. Featuring all three surprise endings!!

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Encino Man
programme.desc: Two high school buddies dig up a frozen caveman in their backyard!

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: Two top secret agents (Will Smith and Tommy Lee Jones) are on a mission of policing alien activities on planet Earth. The Men in Black's current assignment: to stop an intergalactic terrorist from making Earth his next victim.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Agents Jay and Kay are re-teamed against a sinister seductress who represents the toughest challenge yet to the MIB.

programme.title: Men in Black³
programme.desc: Agent Jay travels back in time to 1969, where he teams up with a younger version of Agent Kay to stop an evil alien from destroying the future.

programme.title: Licorice Pizza
programme.desc: Licorice Pizza' is the story of Alana Kane and Gary Valentine growing up, running around and falling in love in the San Fernando Valley, 1973. Written and Directed by Paul Thomas Anderson, the film tracks the treacherous navigation of first love.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life
programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives on a Wyoming ranch with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Beautiful Boy
programme.desc: Bill (Michael Sheen) and Kate’s (Maria Bello) already strained marriage is tested when their college-age son commits a shocking act of violence that reverberates across the country.

programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: A jury fixer plays a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a jury member and a mysterious outsider who both offer to 'deliver' the verdict to the highest bidder. Soon, lives and millions of dollars are at stake in this pulse-pounder filled with twists and turns.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints

programme.title: Revolver

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker

programme.title: Identity

programme.desc: As an actress begins to adopt the persona of her character in a film, her world becomes nightmarish and surreal.

programme.title: Feast
programme.desc: Customers locked inside a bar are forced to fight monsters.

programme.desc: A group of kids are trapped in the woods and methodically killed off by a horrifying flesh-eating virus.

programme.title: The Ruins

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil (2014)
programme.desc: A NYPD officer (Eric Bana) and unconventional priest Mendoza (Edgar Ramírez) who join forces to investigate a series of disturbing & inexplicable crimes. Together, they must combat the possessions that are terrorizing their city before it's too late.

programme.title: Crawl
programme.desc: As a hurricane tears through Florida, Haley rushes to find her father, who is injured and trapped in the crawl space of their home. With the storm intensifying and water levels rising, the pair face an even bigger threat lurking below the surface.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members wake up on an abandoned spacecraft without knowing who they are, how long they've been asleep, or their mission. Soon after, they discover they're not alone, and the situation is more horrifying than they ever could have imagined.

programme.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
programme.desc: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic. Still, things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people in this hilarious and action-packed adventure.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Exploring lost empires and finding priceless treasures... it's all in a day's work for Lara Croft. Though, a secret from her father's past is about to lead Lara to her greatest challenge.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: Cradle of Life
